messages.body: how it is connect to DOM?

In `parseCoursesFromPage`, the DOM connection is direct: it reads all visible text from the page via `document.body.innerText` and splits it into lines, so the initial course parsing is based on the rendered text of the whole document. It then scans actual DOM elements with `document.querySelectorAll("a")` to collect anchor tags and match them back to the parsed courses, adding `klmsCourseId` and `url` when an anchor’s text includes the course name. That’s the only DOM interaction in this function: `document.body.innerText` and `document.querySelectorAll("a")` in `nupjuk-extension/content.js`.
